computation_method: Compute separately for each registered candidate. Numerator counts pilot pairs where the candidate value has valid provenance, acceptable quality, and valid prediction-time availability. Denominator is 80 locked pilot pairs.
pass_criterion: coverage >= 0.80 for every candidate (each candidate evaluated independently)
notes: Pilot-only threshold; not a final modeling sample threshold.

computation_method: Compute separately for each block (M2=all three registered M2 variables; M3=all three registered M3 variables; M4=all four registered M4 variables). Numerator counts pilot pairs where all variables in the block simultaneously pass Gates G01–G07. Denominator is 80 locked pilot pairs.
pass_criterion: common coverage >= 0.70 for every block (M2, M3, M4 evaluated independently)
notes: Pilot-only threshold; not a final modeling sample threshold.

computation_method: After applying Gates G01–G07, for each block and each target_year temporal stratum (not final modeling folds), count usable positive pilot pairs.
pass_criterion: >= 3 usable positive pairs in every target_year stratum for every block
notes: Temporal stratum is target_year for this pilot only.

computation_method: After applying Gates G01–G07, for each block and each target_year temporal stratum, count usable negative pilot pairs.
pass_criterion: >= 3 usable negative pairs in every target_year stratum for every block
notes: Temporal stratum is target_year for this pilot only.

computation_method: Count of unique predictor_row_key_t in the locked pilot selection (deterministic without replacement from Rule A eligible pool, before accessibility evidence).
notes: Locked in Part 3A.1; not the final modeling sample size.

computation_method: Deterministic without-replacement selection from Rule A eligible pool by frozen identifiers before evidence; positive=39 negative=41 unknown=0; allocation_by_target_year as locked; unique_tickers=26 unique_known_industries=10 industry_present_pairs=53 industry_missing_pairs=27 legacy_nonempty_industry_label_count=11; no post-evidence substitution.
pass_criterion: option=pilot_option_event_enriched; positive=39; negative=41; allocation_by_target_year matches locked table
notes: Failed pairs after evidence must be recorded fail/unresolved; pairs must not be replaced post-evidence.
